description: Discriminating the source variant WITHOUT accessing any post-transition variant field does not fire E-TYPE-LIFECYCLE-VARIANT-NOT-TRANSITIONED (§14.12.6.2). The cell `phase` has the `(.Draft to .Published)` lifecycle; inside `if (@phase is .Draft)` the body renders a constant and reads no post-transition field, so there is no premature access and the check stays silent. The clean twin of e-type-lifecycle-variant-not-transitioned-pos.
rationale: §14.12.6.2 the error fires only on a post-transition FIELD read before transition(); discriminating the source variant and reading no such field is well-formed.
